evidence: Eaton acquired Fibrebond Corporation for $1.43 billion... Fibrebond is a U.S. based designer and builder of pre-integrated modular power enclosures for data center... customers
Eaton will pay $9.5 billion for Boyd Thermal... a U.S. based global leader in thermal components, systems, and ruggedized solutions for data center, aerospace and other end-markets
Recent technological advances in artificial intelligence (AI) and machine-learning technology have presented opportunities for us to drive internal efficiencies in our business operations
Recent technological advances in artificial intelligence (AI) and machine-learning technology have presented opportunities for us to drive internal efficiencies in our business operations
the adoption and integration of artificial intelligence, demand for our products could decline
the development and use of artificial intelligence in our business operations, including potential impacts on compliance with law and our reputation

introduction of AI technologies, particularly generative AI, into internal processes and/or new and existing offerings may result in new or expanded risks and liabilities, including due to enhanced governmental or regulatory scrutiny, litigation, compliance issues, ethical concerns, confidentiality or security risks

any confidential information that is disclosed to a third-party generative AI platform could be leaked or disclosed to others, which could result in loss or theft of intellectual property, as well as subject us to risks related to intellectual property infringement or misappropriation, data privacy and cybersecurity
the use of AI may give rise to risks related to harmful content, accuracy, and bias, which could expose us to risks related to inaccuracies or errors in the output of such technologies

capex_mentions.quote: Eaton acquired Fibrebond Corporation for $1.43 billion, net of cash acquired
capex_mentions.context: April 2025 acquisition of modular data center power enclosure builder

capex_mentions.quote: Eaton will pay $9.5 billion for Boyd Thermal
capex_mentions.context: Agreement to acquire data center thermal solutions provider, expected to close Q2 2026

capex_mentions.quote: Eaton acquired Ultra PCS Limited for $1.53 billion, net of cash acquired
capex_mentions.context: January 2026 acquisition of aerospace electronic controls producer

limitations: AI investment intensity scored 3 rather than higher because the large acquisitions (Fibrebond, Boyd Thermal) are primarily data center infrastructure plays, not AI-specific capex; no dedicated AI budget or AI-specific spend is quantified in the excerpts
AI narrative concreteness is low (score 2) because AI use cases are described only aspirationally as 'internal efficiencies' with no named initiatives, deployed systems, or metrics

Risk disclosure scored 4 because multiple company-specific risk mechanisms are named (IP leakage via third-party generative AI, regulatory scrutiny, bias/accuracy errors, cybersecurity) with causal pathways described, though no quantification or named governance body appears in the excerpts
Excerpts do not contain evidence of a dedicated AI capex line, named AI vendor/cloud partnerships, or quantified AI headcount
